form.formComment: Half-sister to dual-Group 2 winner Barb Raider. Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. Resuming ran on strongly from last on the turn; 3rd of 9 at this track Mdn on March 15 over 1000m, on a slow track; nose behind Nottington Prince carrying 57.5kg at $2.70. Second run from a spell favourite; tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 2.75 len at this track Mdn March 31 over 1200m on a soft track defeating Shadyvale Al carrying 60kg at $1.65. Profiles nicely. Hard to go past.
